docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JODIE STEINBERG IN SUPPORT OF RESPONDENT'S LIMITED OPPOS TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER ARTEM ILINETS PETITION FOR AN ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE ARBITRATION AWARD OF $19,005 IS CONFIRMED. THE REQUEST FOR COSTS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEKING COSTS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1700. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER RE MOTION TO STRIKE OR TAX COSTS HEARD ON 2/20/08 - THE COURT HEARD ARGUMENT FROM COUNSEL, FURTHER AUTHORITIES NEEDED FROM COUNSEL - MATTER IS CONTINUED TO A CONTROL DATE FOR THE SUBMISSION OF REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION FROM COUNSEL. THE CONTROL DATE IS MARCH 5, 2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 611 ON COURTS OWN MOTION. JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK, CLERK KARISSA SHAW, REPORTER KAREN FARNSWORTH CSR #5162. (611)
